methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $85M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $100M - $3.3B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 6.6x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Zeta Surgical
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series A), post-money $100M

data.narrative:
Multiply Labs is a Series A biotech company founded by Fred Parietti and Alice Melocchi that has raised $41M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comparables universe of 11 peers across Biotech & Health—3 public companies (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) and 8 private-stage companies including Eikon Therapeutics, Neko Health, and Asimov.

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis, anchored to the $85M total-raised proxy and applying a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical for Series A advancement, implies a $170M valuation. Peer-median analysis across 6 same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables yields a $805M implied value, with the peer set ranging from $100M (floor) to $3.3B (ceiling). Public-comp anchoring cannot be applied; the three public Biotech & Health comps trade at a 6.6x median P/S, but Multiply Labs' revenue is not disclosed.

The triangulated valuation range is $144M (low) to $926M (high), with a median of $488M. The wide spread reflects the dual methodologies' divergence: stage-progression yields a conservative bottom-end estimate tied directly to capital raised, while peer medians capture valuations for more mature Series B companies. Key uncertainties include the strength of Multiply Labs' IP and clinical-stage assets relative to peers, and the timing and terms of the next funding event. The $488M median provides a reasonable central estimate pending disclosure of additional operational metrics.
